page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m4s.2xlarge is a KVM-virtualized instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs running at 2.9 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB per core. It includes a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with a 0.1667 allocation and 4 GB of VRAM. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, and it features a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier for most compute tasks. The single-core stress-ng performance is 1861.49, and the multi-core score is 13123.11. Memory bandwidth is measured at 786.13 GB/sec for small-block cached reads, dropping to 70.29 GB/sec for large-block uncached reads, while PassMark rates the memory subsystem in the lower 25% tier. For LLM workloads, the fractional GPU delivers 680.67 tokens/sec for prompt processing on a small 135M model, but performance drops to 15.5 tokens/sec on a medium 7B model.

Given the fractional GPU allocation and moderate memory-to-vCPU ratio, this instance offers a cost-efficient entry point for workloads requiring GPU acceleration without the expense of a full dedicated GPU. It is suited for lightweight GPU-accelerated tasks, virtual workstations, small-scale AI inference, and general-purpose compute workloads that benefit from hardware-accelerated media processing or basic parallel computing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m4s.2xlarge is a KVM-virtualized instance equipped with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs at 2.9 GHz, 16.0 GB of RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU providing 4 GB of VRAM. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps and lacks local storage. Benchmarks indicate average CPU performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 13123.11 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 7000.0. Memory performance is relatively weak, scoring in the bottom 25% on PassMark. The fractional GPU is capable of processing 680.67 tokens/sec for small 135M LLM prompts, but struggles with larger models. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring light GPU acceleration, such as virtual workstations, entry-level AI inference, and parallel compute tasks, without the cost of a full GPU.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m4s.2xlarge is a KVM-virtualized instance with 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 4 GB VRAM, designed for light GPU-accelerated workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m4s.2xlarge features 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU for entry-level accelerated computing.
tagline: A cost-effective virtualized instance combining dedicated Intel Xeon processors with fractional NVIDIA GPU acceleration for lightweight parallel workloads.

Fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 4 GB VRAM
16.0 GB system memory (2.0 GB per core)
Best suited for virtual workstations and lightweight AI inference
